title: zehneria perpusilla var. deltifrons
intro: Zehneria perpusilla var. deltifrons, commonly known as the Java dodder or climbing dodder, is a plant species belonging to the family Cucurbitaceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Zehneria perpusilla var. deltifrons include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its anti-cancer properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are said to promote digestive health and boost the immune system.
